subcodes.first_line: I beseech Thee, O my God, my Lord, my Creator and my Beloved, by the ocean of Thy Most Great Name and by the heaven which Thou hast raised up [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: اسئلک یا الهی و مالکی و خالقی و محبوبی ببحر اسمک الاعظم و بالسماء التی رفعتها
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for protection, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @prayer for nearness to God
